---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help improve Agent Forge
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `agent-forge run --task "..." --repo ./path`
2. Observe error...

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include logs or error output (sanitize any API keys!).

## Environment

- **OS:** (e.g., Ubuntu 24.04)
- **Python version:** (e.g., 3.12.1)
- **Docker version:** (e.g., 27.0.1)
- **Agent Forge version:** (e.g., 0.1.0)
- **LLM Provider:** (e.g., Gemini, OpenAI)

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or log files.
